defaultBudgetHint: Used when a month has no specific budget row. Dashboard “monthly budget” sets a per-month override.
defaultBudgetInvalid: Enter a valid non-negative number, or leave empty to clear the default
deleteLedgerWarning: This permanently deletes all transactions, categories, tags, projects, and budgets in this ledger. For a family ledger that still has linked personal books, unlink them on Members first.
deleteLedgerTypeName: Type the ledger name to confirm: {{name}}
deleteLedgerMismatch: Name does not match this ledger
